cleaned_html_body:
Hi Mr. Setton,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to introduce Arooj Enterprises, a leading textile manufacturer based in Pakistan, specializing in high-quality knitwear. Our expertise and certifications, including ISO 14001, SEDEX, and OEKO-TEX, align perfectly with the standards required by your retail partners like Walmart.com and ThredUp.

Your recent imports of knitted sweaters and pullovers (HS 6110) from Jiangying Yongtong and Shanghai Sun Brilliant caught my attention. At Arooj Enterprises, we excel in these categories, with a monthly capacity of 150,000 units that can scale to meet your needs. Our vertical integration ensures control over every step from yarn to finished garment, guaranteeing consistent quality and lead times.

Given your focus on synthetic knitwear, our Pakistan-based production offers an unmatched cost-to-quality ratio. We are eager to send samples of our 6110.30 (man-made fibers) and 6110.20 (cotton) lines for your team to review.

I would appreciate the opportunity to discuss how Arooj Enterprises can contribute to your supply chain. Please let me know if a quick call this week would be convenient for you.

Best regards,
Asad Irfan | Senior Marketing Manager | Arooj Enterprises | www.texbase.com
